{"text":"00:03","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":3}},{"text":" Depression is not solely a chemical imbalance."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"01:46","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":106}},{"text":" Having everything doesn't guarantee happiness"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"03:13","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":193}},{"text":" Trying to make yourself happier in the US does not actually make you happier"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"04:56","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":296}},{"text":" Making others happy doesn't necessarily make you happy"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"06:38","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":398}},{"text":" Success is equated with alleviation of debt and problems, not necessarily happiness."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"08:15","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":495}},{"text":" Guaranteed basic income in a Canadian town led to a decrease in depression and anxiety."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"09:52","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":592}},{"text":" Financial anxiety is a major driver of despair, causing depression and anxiety."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"11:42","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"JNiPxNkr_Lk","startTimeSeconds":702}},{"text":" Improving society and making positive lifestyle changes can reduce the need for chemical antidepressants."},{"text":"

{"text":"00:01","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":1}},{"text":" Having close friends is crucial for happiness and health."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"01:36","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":96}},{"text":" Regularly spending time with people is the most important principle of making friends"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"03:12","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":192}},{"text":" Most people don't prioritize friendships enough, resulting in fewer in their thirties"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"04:37","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":277}},{"text":" Friendship networks are often structured around central hubs, making people vulnerable. Time invested in prioritizing relationships is key to making and retaining friends."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"06:13","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":373}},{"text":" Finding new friends is easier when you know yourself and explore your interests."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"07:36","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":456}},{"text":" Invest in building friendships for a happy life"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"09:05","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":545}},{"text":" Caring and sharing are important for making friends."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"10:27","videoLink":{"externalVideoId":"I9hJ_Rux9y0","startTimeSeconds":627}},{"text":" Prioritize friendships and have fun without expectations"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"Crafted by Merlin AI."}
